steps: A hemisphere is half a sphere. The volume of a full sphere is $V = \frac{4}{3}\pi r^3$, so a hemisphere has volume $V = \frac{2}{3}\pi r^3$.

• A: 1,500 — Far too small for $r = 27$. Eliminated.
  • B: 6,100 — Still much too small. Eliminated.
  • C: 30,900 — About 10,000 below the computed value. Eliminated.
  • D: 41,200 — Closest to 41,234. That matches choice D — D is correct.
